data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tier-based perk visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and offers, none of them directly address the visibility of perks based on membership tiers, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
